# Description

<!-- What does this PR add or change? Which skill(s)? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `./tools/validate-skills.sh` passes
- [ ] Skill uses Couchbase-native terminology (SQL++, GSI, Bucket/Scope/Collection, Search Service)
- [ ] Skill is MCP-grounded and read-only by default (writes/DDL require explicit user approval)
- [ ] `references/` used for depth; `SKILL.md` kept focused
- [ ] Eval suite added/updated under `testing/` (if applicable)
- [ ] `skills/OWNERS.yaml` updated (if adding a skill)
